chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.916 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 28.04.2025 Mr. Imran Ali Pirzada, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh IO/SIP Aziz Ahmed & SIP Zulfiqar of P.S. Gizri ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
